component.name: FrogTalk
component.summary: Privacy-first chat, social feed, communities, and calls

description.p: FrogTalk is an open source desktop client for encrypted direct messages, public and private channels, a built-in social feed, reels, voice and video calls, stories, and a 4chan-style FrogChannel board.
The app is designed for self-hosting and federation-friendly communities, while still working as a single desktop app for everyday chat, media, and real-time social activity.

ul.li: Public and private channels with voice and video calls
Frog Social feed, reels, stories, and music sharing
FrogChannel imageboard and live community discovery
Discord and Telegram bridge support for linked communities

screenshot.caption: Frog Social feed with inline media posts and shared music
Encrypted channel chat with inline social cards and media
Channel directory for discovering and joining communities
FrogChannel board view for anonymous community threads

ul.li: Desktop release with encrypted chat, social feed, and community features
